title: Hyogo Medical Directory
heroDescription: Tafuta kliniki katika Mkoa wa Hyogo kulingana na fani na eneo. Takwimu hizi zimetolewa na JICA; ukipata makosa yoyote, tafadhali tujulishe kupitia fomu iliyo chini ya ukurasa huu.
noFacilitiesDesc: We couldn't find any hospitals or clinics matching your current active filters. Please try adjusting your criteria.
